title: Ability to query for assets in the files gallery via API

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello team!

Request: When you click on an item, you can see the “files gallery” tab where you can upload files (assets).

The request would be to be able to access those assets via the API as it an be done for files in files columns or in updates.
